title: dalea candida var. oligophylla
intro: Dalea candida var. oligophylla, also known as the prairie rose or narrow-leaf prairie clover, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the pea family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits in promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. Dalea candida var. oligophylla can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried root, offering a natural remedy for various ailments.
